rationale: Corpus 'Senior/Staff' bucket has 3 real points from 3 named companies (Adyen Senior Implementation Engineer $184K-$276K; GitLab Senior Manager, PS Technical Architect $171K-$289K; Broadcom Sr Mainframe Technical Consultant $100K-$160K). File's L5 base p50 ($189K) sits comfortably inside this range and close to the Adyen/GitLab lower bounds. Raising low→medium on the strength of this direct corpus evidence.
